title: SADHANA Saptah 2026: 3.18 Crore Course Completions Mark Shift to Results-Based Governance
description: Emphasising the role of technology, Dr. Singh identified artificial intelligence and digital tools as key enablers of future-ready governance.
content: In a major milestone for India’s civil services reform agenda, Union Minister Dr Jitendra Singh felicitated top-performing Ministries, Departments, and States at the concluding ceremony of “SADHANA Saptah 2026”, highlighting a transformative shift to... [4776 chars]

title: Punjab to integrate AI as core subject in schools, marks to reflect on Board certificates
description: Punjab's school education board will integrate Artificial Intelligence as a core component of its curriculum, with learning outcomes to be reflected on student certificates. This forward-looking initiative aims to enhance quality, innovation, and modernization, preparing students for a technology-driven world. The state board is committed to building an ethical foundation for AI usage, fostering skilled users and responsible digital citizens.
content:

title: Gov't to study legality of using voices for AI-cloned content
description: The Japanese government will establish a council of experts to discuss whether the unauthorized use of sound data in artificial intelligence-generated content emulating voice actors violates the Civil Code, amid the rapid advance of generative AI technology, it said Friday. The Justice Ministry panel will discuss the issue, along with…

title: Bombay HC grants interim relief to Kartik Aaryan, protects personality rights
description: The HC perused explicit Artificial Intelligence (AI)- generated content "prima facie prejudicial" to Aaryan's reputation and observed, " The obscene and disparaging content uploaded on public viewing platform needs urgent deletion/delisting.
content: The Bombay HC has granted relief to at least six other celebrities since 2024. The personality rights of celebrities consist their name, voice, signature, image, or any other characteristic that identifies their personality and is readily recognisabl... [1819 chars]

title: AI Revolutionizes Punjab School Education as Core Component
description: Punjab School Education Board plans to integrate Artificial Intelligence into its curriculum, marking a major shift in educational focus. This initiative aims to enhance learning outcomes and modernize education by preparing students for a tech-driven world, reflecting achievements directly on students' certificates.
content: The Punjab School Education Board (PSEB) has announced that Artificial Intelligence (AI) will be a fundamental part of the state's school curriculum. This decision was unveiled at a high-level AI conference organized by PSEB, aimed at reshaping the e... [806 chars]

title: Thousands of authors seek share of Anthropic copyright settlement
description: Nearly 120,000 authors and other copyright holders are seeking a share of a $1.5 ​billion class-action settlement with Anthropic over the ​company's unauthorised use of their books in artificial-intelligence training, according to a filing in ​California federal court.

title: Reese Witherspoon warns AI is three times more likely to replace women
description: Actress Reese Witherspoon warned women that their jobs are three times more likely to be replaced by artificial intelligence than those of men unless they begin learning how to use the technology.
content:
